While exploring states, it compares the behavior of a file system under test against a reference file system and reports any discrepancies; it also provides support to investigate and reproduce any that are found. We also developed RefFS, a small, fast file system that serves as a reference, with special features designed to accelerate model checking and enhance bug reproducibility. Experimental results show that Metis can flexibly generate test inputs; also the rate at which it explores file-system states scales nearly linearly across multiple nodes. RefFS explores states 3–28× faster than other, more mature file systems. Metis aided the development of RefFS, reporting 11 bugs that we subsequently fixed. Metis further identified 12 bugs from five other file systems, five of which were confirmed and with one fixed and integrated into Linux.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出 Metis，这是一个模型检查框架，旨在以输入和状态探索的形式进行多功能、彻底且可配置的文件系统测试。它使用非确定性循环和加权方案来决定要执行哪些系统调用及其参数。 Metis 为文件系统状态提供了一种新的抽象状态表示，以支持高效且有效的状态探索。在探索状态时，它将被测文件系统的行为与参考文件系统进行比较并报告任何差异；它还为调查和重现所发现的任何问题提供支持。我们还开发了 RefFS，这是一种小型、快速的文件系统，可用作参考，具有旨在加速模型检查和增强错误重现性的特殊功能。实验结果表明Metis可以灵活生成测试输入；它还探索文件系统状态的速率在多个节点上几乎呈线性扩展。 RefFS 探索状态的速度比其他更成熟的文件系统快 3-28 倍。 Metis 帮助开发了 RefFS，报告了 11 个错误，我们随后修复了这些错误。 Metis 进一步从其他 5 个文件系统中发现了 12 个错误，其中 5 个已得到确认，其中 1 个已修复并集成到 Linux 中。

papers.title: MIDAS: Minimizing Write Amplification in Log-Structured Systems through Adaptive Group Number and Size Configuration.
papers.abstract: Log-structured systems are widely used in various applications because of its high write throughput. However, high garbage collection (GC) cost is widely regarded as the primary obstacle for its wider adoption. There have been numerous attempts to alleviate GC overhead, but with ad-hoc designs. This paper introduces MiDAS that minimizes GC overhead in a systematic and analytic manner. It employs a chain-like structure of multiple groups, automatically segregating data blocks by age. It employs analytical models, Update Interval Distribution (UID) and Markov-Chain-based Analytical Model (MCAM), to dynamically adjust the number of groups as well as their sizes according to the workload I/O patterns, thereby minimizing the movement of data blocks. Furthermore, MiDAS isolates hot blocks into a dedicated HOT group, where the size of HOT is dynamically adjusted according to the workload to minimize overall WAF. Our experiments using simulations and a proof-of-concept prototype for flash-based SSDs show that MiDAS outperforms state-of-the-art GC techniques, offering 25% lower WAF and 54% higher throughput, while consuming less memory and CPU cycles.
papers.abstract_zh: 日志结构系统因其高写入吞吐量而广泛应用于各种应用中。然而，高垃圾收集（GC）成本被广泛认为是其广泛采用的主要障碍。人们已经进行了许多尝试来减轻 GC 开销，但都是采用临时设计。本文介绍了 MiDAS，它以系统和分析的方式最小化 GC 开销。它采用多组的链式结构，自动按年龄分隔数据块。它采用分析模型、更新间隔分布（UID）和基于马尔可夫链的分析模型（MCAM），根据工作负载 I/O 模式动态调整组的数量及其大小，从而最大限度地减少数据块的移动。此外，MiDAS 将热块隔离到专用的 HOT 组中，其中 HOT 的大小根据工作负载动态调整，以最大限度地减少整体 WAF。我们使用基于闪存 SSD 的模拟和概念验证原型进行的实验表明，MiDAS 的性能优于最先进的 GC 技术，将 WAF 降低 25%，吞吐量提高 54%，同时消耗更少的内存和 CPU 周期。

papers.title: MinFlow: High-performance and Cost-efficient Data Passing for I/O-intensive Stateful Serverless Analytics.
papers.abstract: Serverless computing has revolutionized application deployment, obviating traditional infrastructure management and dynamically allocating resources on demand. A significant use case is I/O-intensive applications like data analytics, which widely employ the pivotal "shuffle" operation. Unfortunately, the shuffle operation poses severe challenges due to the massive PUT/GET requests to remote storage, especially in high-parallelism scenarios, leading to high performance degradation and storage cost. Existing designs optimize the data passing performance from multiple aspects, while they operate in an isolated way, thus still introducing unforeseen performance bottlenecks and bypassing untapped optimization opportunities. In this paper, we develop MinFlow, a holistic data passing framework for I/O-intensive serverless analytics jobs. MinFlow first rapidly generates numerous feasible multi-level data passing topologies with much fewer PUT/GET operations, then it leverages an interleaved partitioning strategy to divide the topology DAG into small-size bipartite sub-graphs to optimize function scheduling, further reducing over half of the transmitted data to remote storage. Moreover, MinFlow also develops a precise model to determine the optimal configuration, thus minimizing data passing time under practical function deployments. We implement a prototype of MinFlow, and extensive experiments show that MinFlow significantly outperforms state-of-the-art systems, FaaSFlow and Lambada, in both the job completion time and storage cost.
papers.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算彻底改变了应用程序部署，消除了传统的基础设施管理并按需动态分配资源。一个重要的用例是数据分析等 I/O 密集型应用程序，它们广泛采用关键的“shuffle”操作。不幸的是，由于对远程存储的大量 PUT/GET 请求，特别是在高并行度场景下，shuffle 操作带来了严峻的挑战，导致性能下降和存储成本很高。现有的设计从多个方面优化数据传递性能，但它们以隔离的方式运行，因此仍然引入了不可预见的性能瓶颈并绕过了未开发的优化机会。在本文中，我们开发了 MinFlow，这是一个用于 I/O 密集型无服务器分析作业的整体数据传递框架。 MinFlow首先以更少的PUT/GET操作快速生成大量可行的多级数据传递拓扑，然后利用交错分区策略将拓扑DAG划分为小尺寸的二分子图以优化函数调度，进一步减少一半以上传输到远程存储的数据。此外，MinFlow还开发了精确的模型来确定最佳配置，从而最大限度地减少实际功能部署下的数据传递时间。我们实现了 MinFlow 的原型，大量的实验表明，MinFlow 在作业完成时间和存储成本方面都显着优于最先进的系统 FaaSFlow 和 Lambada。

papers.title: OmniCache: Collaborative Caching for Near-storage Accelerators.
papers.abstract: We propose OmniCache , a novel caching design for near-storage accelerators that combines near-storage and host memory capabilities to accelerate I/O and data processing. First, OmniCache introduces a "near-cache" approach , maximizing data access to the nearest cache for I/O and processing operations. Second, OmniCache presents collaborative caching for concurrent I/O and data processing using host and device caches. Third, OmniCache incorporates a dynamic model-driven offloading support, which actively monitors hardware and software metrics for efficient processing across host and device processors. Finally, OmniCache explores the extensibility of the newly introduced CXL , a memory expansion technology. Evaluation of OmniCache demonstrates significant performance gains of up to 3.24X for I/O workloads and 3.06X for data processing workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 OmniCache，这是一种针对近存储加速器的新型缓存设计，它结合了近存储和主机内存功能来加速 I/O 和数据处理。首先，OmniCache引入了“近缓存”方法，最大限度地提高对最近缓存的数据访问以进行I/O和处理操作。其次，OmniCache 提供了使用主机和设备缓存进行并发 I/O 和数据处理的协作缓存。第三，OmniCache 整合了动态模型驱动的卸载支持，可主动监控硬件和软件指标，以便跨主机和设备处理器进行高效处理。最后，OmniCache探索了新推出的CXL内存扩展技术的可扩展性。对 OmniCache 的评估表明，I/O 工作负载的性能显着提升了 3.24 倍，数据处理工作负载的性能提升了 3.06 倍。

papers.title: Optimizing File Systems on Heterogeneous Memory by Integrating DRAM Cache with Virtual Memory Management.
papers.abstract: This paper revisits the usage of DRAM cache in DRAM-PM heterogeneous memory file systems. With a comprehensive analysis of existing file systems with cache-based and DAX-based designs, we show that both suffer from suboptimal performance due to excessive data movement. To this end, this paper presents a cache management layer atop heterogeneous memory, namely FLAC, which integrates DRAM cache with virtual memory management. FLAC is further incorporated with two techniques called zero-copy caching and parallel-optimized cache management, which facilitates fast data transfer between file systems and applications as well as efficient data synchronization/migration between DRAM and PM. We further design and implement a library file system upon FLAC, called FlacFS. Micro benchmarks show that FlacFS provides up to two orders of magnitude performance improvement over existing file systems in file read/write. With real-world applications, FlacFS achieves up to 10.6 and 9.9 times performance speedup over state-of-the-art DAX-based and cache-based file systems, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文重新审视 DRAM 缓存在 DRAM-PM 异构内存文件系统中的使用。通过对基于缓存和基于 DAX 设计的现有文件系统进行全面分析，我们发现这两种系统都因数据移动过多而导致性能不佳。为此，本文提出了一种异构内存之上的缓存管理层，即FLAC，它将DRAM缓存与虚拟内存管理集成在一起。 FLAC 进一步结合了零拷贝缓存和并行优化缓存管理两种技术，有助于文件系统和应用程序之间的快速数据传输以及 DRAM 和 PM 之间的高效数据同步/迁移。我们进一步在FLAC上设计并实现了一个库文件系统，称为FlacFS。微观基准测试表明，FlacFS 在文件读/写方面比现有文件系统提供高达两个数量级的性能提升。在实际应用中，与最先进的基于 DAX 和基于缓存的文件系统相比，FlacFS 分别实现了高达 10.6 倍和 9.9 倍的性能加速。

papers.title: Physical vs. Logical Indexing with IDEA: Inverted Deduplication-Aware Index.
papers.abstract: In the realm of information retrieval, the need to maintain reliable term-indexing has grown more acute in recent years, with vast amounts of ever-growing online data searched by a large number of search-engine users and used for data mining and natural language processing. At the same time, an increasing portion of primary storage systems employ data deduplication, where duplicate logical data chunks are replaced with references to a unique physical copy. We show that indexing deduplicated data with deduplication-oblivious mechanisms might result in extreme inefficiencies: the index size would increase in proportion to the logical data size, regardless of its duplication ratio, consuming excessive storage and memory and slowing down lookups. In addition, the logically sequential accesses during index creation would be transformed into random and redundant accesses to the physical chunks. Indeed, to the best of our knowledge, term indexing is not supported by any deduplicating storage system. In this paper, we propose the design of a deduplication-aware term-index that addresses these challenges. IDEA maps terms to the unique chunks that contain them, and maps each chunk to the files in which it is contained. This basic design concept improves the index performance and can support advanced functionalities such as inline indexing, result ranking, and proximity search. Our prototype implementation based on Lucene (the search engine at the core of Elasticsearch) shows that IDEA can reduce the index size and indexing time by up to 73% and 94%, respectively, and reduce term-lookup latency by up to 82% and 59% for single and multi-term queries, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 在信息检索领域，近年来，随着大量搜索引擎用户搜索大量不断增长的在线数据并用于数据挖掘和自然语言处理，维护可靠的术语索引的需求变得更加迫切。与此同时，越来越多的主存储系统采用重复数据删除技术，其中重复的逻辑数据块被替换为对唯一物理副本的引用。我们表明，使用重复数据删除忽略机制对重复数据删除数据进行索引可能会导致效率极低：无论其重复率如何，索引大小都会与逻辑数据大小成比例增加，从而消耗过多的存储和内存并减慢查找速度。此外，索引创建期间的逻辑顺序访问将转换为对物理块的随机和冗余访问。事实上，据我们所知，任何重复数据删除存储系统都不支持术语索引。在本文中，我们提出了一种可解决这些挑战的重复数据删除感知术语索引的设计。 IDEA 将术语映射到包含它们的唯一块，并将每个块映射到包含它的文件。这一基本设计理念提高了索引性能，并支持内联索引、结果排名和邻近搜索等高级功能。我们基于 Lucene（Elasticsearch 的核心搜索引擎）的原型实现表明，IDEA 可以将索引大小和索引时间分别减少多达 73% 和 94%，并将单术语和多术语查询的术语查找延迟分别降低多达 82% 和 59%。

papers.title: RFUSE: Modernizing Userspace Filesystem Framework through Scalable Kernel-Userspace Communication.
papers.abstract: With the advancement of storage devices and the increasing scale of data, filesystem design has transformed in response to this progress. However, implementing new features within an in-kernel filesystem is a challenging task due to development complexity and code security concerns. As an alternative, userspace filesystems are gaining attention, owing to their ease of development and reliability. FUSE is a renowned framework that allows users to develop custom filesystems in userspace. However, the complex internal stack of FUSE leads to notable performance overhead, which becomes even more prominent in modern hardware environments with high-performance storage devices and a large number of cores. In this paper, we present RFUSE, a novel userspace filesystem framework that utilizes scalable message communication between the kernel and userspace. RFUSE employs a per-core ring buffer structure as a communication channel and effectively minimizes transmission overhead caused by context switches and request copying. Furthermore, RFUSE enables users to utilize existing FUSE-based filesystems without making any modifications. Our evaluation results indicate that RFUSE demonstrates comparable throughput to in-kernel filesystems on high-performance devices while exhibiting high scalability in both data and metadata operations.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着存储设备的进步和数据规模的不断扩大，文件系统设计也随之发生了转变。然而，由于开发复杂性和代码安全问题，在内核文件系统中实现新功能是一项具有挑战性的任务。作为替代方案，用户空间文件系统由于其易于开发和可靠性而受到关注。 FUSE 是一个著名的框架，允许用户在用户空间中开发自定义文件系统。然而，FUSE复杂的内部堆栈导致了显着的性能开销，这在具有高性能存储设备和大量内核的现代硬件环境中变得更加突出。在本文中，我们提出了 RFUSE，一种新颖的用户空间文件系统框架，它利用内核和用户空间之间的可扩展消息通信。 RFUSE采用每核环形缓冲区结构作为通信通道，有效地最小化上下文切换和请求复制引起的传输开销。此外，RFUSE 使用户能够利用现有的基于 FUSE 的文件系统，而无需进行任何修改。我们的评估结果表明，RFUSE 表现出与高性能设备上的内核文件系统相当的吞吐量，同时在数据和元数据操作方面表现出高可扩展性。

papers.title: Seraph: Towards Scalable and Efficient Fully-external Graph Computation via On-demand Processing.
papers.abstract: Fully-external graph computation systems exhibit optimal scalability by computing the ever-growing, large-scale graph with constant amount of memory on a single machine. In particular, they keep the entire massive graph data in storage and iteratively load parts of them into memory for computation. Nevertheless, despite the merit of optimal scalability, their unreasonably-low efficiency often makes them uncompetitive, and even unpractical, to the other types of graph computation systems. The key rationale is that most existing fully-external graph computation systems over-emphasize retrieving graph data from storage through sequential access. Although this principle achieves high storage bandwidth, it often causes reading excessive and irrelevant data, which can severely degrade their overall efficiency. Therefore, this work presents Seraph, a fully-external graph computation system that achieves optimal S calability while toward satisfactory E fficiency improvement. Particularly, inspired by the modern storage offering comparable sequential and random access speeds, Seraph adopts the principle of on-demand processing to access the necessary graph data for saving I/O while enjoying the decent speed in random access. On the basis of this principle, Seraph further devises three practical designs to bring excellent performance leap to fully-external graph computation: 1) the hybrid format to represent the graph data for striking a good balance between I/O amount and access locality, 2) the vertex passing to enable efficient vertex updates on top of hybrid format, and 3) the selective pre-computation to re-use the loaded data for I/O reduction. Our evaluations reveal that Seraph notably outperforms other state-of-the-art fully-external systems under all the evaluated billion-scale graphs and representative graph algorithms by up to two orders of magnitude.
papers.abstract_zh: 完全外部的图计算系统通过在单台机器上计算具有恒定内存量的不断增长的大规模图来表现出最佳的可扩展性。特别是，它们将整个海量图数据保存在存储中，并迭代地将其中的一部分加载到内存中进行计算。然而，尽管具有最佳可扩展性的优点，但它们不合理的低效率往往使它们与其他类型的图计算系统相比没有竞争力，甚至不切实际。关键原理是大多数现有的完全外部图计算系统过分强调通过顺序访问从存储中检索图数据。尽管这一原理实现了高存储带宽，但它经常会导致读取过多且不相关的数据，从而严重降低其整体效率。因此，这项工作提出了 Seraph，一个完全外部的图计算系统，它实现了最佳的 S 可扩展性，同时实现了令人满意的效率提高。特别是，受到现代存储提供可比的顺序和随机访问速度的启发，Seraph采用按需处理的原理来访问必要的图形数据以节省I/O，同时享受不错的随机访问速度。在此原则的基础上，Seraph进一步设计了三种实用设计，为完全外部图计算带来卓越的性能飞跃：1）混合格式表示图数据，在I/O量和访问局部性之间取得良好的平衡；2）顶点传递以在混合格式之上实现高效的顶点更新；3）选择性预计算以重用加载的数据以减少I/O。我们的评估表明，在所有评估的十亿级图和代表性图算法中，Seraph 的性能明显优于其他最先进的完全外部系统，最高可达两个数量级。

papers.title: Symbiosis: The Art of Application and Kernel Cache Cooperation.
papers.abstract: We introduce Symbiosis , a framework for key-value storage systems that dynamically configures application and kernel cache sizes to improve performance. We integrate Symbiosis into three production systems — LevelDB, WiredTiger, and RocksDB — and, through a series of experiments on various read-heavy workloads and environments, show that Symbiosis improves performance by 1.5× on average and over 5× at best compared to static configurations, across a wide range of synthetic and real-world workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们引入 Symbiosis，这是一个键值存储系统框架，可动态配置应用程序和内核缓存大小以提高性能。我们将 Symbiosis 集成到三个生产系统中——LevelDB、WiredTiger 和 RocksDB——并且通过对各种读取密集型工作负载和环境进行的一系列实验表明，与静态配置相比，Symbiosis 在各种合成和实际工作负载中平均提高了 1.5 倍，最多提高了 5 倍以上。

papers.title: TeRM: Extending RDMA-Attached Memory with SSD.
papers.abstract: RDMA-based in-memory storage systems offer high performance but are restricted by the capacity of physical memory. In this paper, we propose TeRM to extend RDMA-attached memory with SSD. TeRM achieves fast remote access on the SSD-extended memory by eliminating page faults of RDMA NIC and CPU from the critical path. We also introduce a set of techniques to reduce the consumption of CPU and network resources. Evaluation shows that TeRM performs close to the performance of the ideal upper bound where all pages are pinned in the physical memory. Compared with existing approaches TeRM significantly improves the performance of unmodified RDMA-based storage systems, including a file system and a key-value system.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于RDMA的内存存储系统提供高性能，但受到物理内存容量的限制。在本文中，我们提出 TeRM 使用 SSD 扩展 RDMA 附加内存。 TeRM通过从关键路径消除RDMA网卡和CPU的页面错误，实现SSD扩展内存的快速远程访问。我们还引入了一套技术来减少CPU和网络资源的消耗。评估表明，TeRM 的性能接近理想上限（所有页面都固定在物理内存中）。与现有方法相比，TeRM 显着提高了未经修改的基于 RDMA 的存储系统（包括文件系统和键值系统）的性能。

papers.title: The Design and Implementation of a Capacity-Variant Storage System.
papers.abstract: We present the design and implementation of a capacity-variant storage system (CVSS) for flash-based solid-state drives (SSDs). CVSS aims to maintain high performance throughout the lifetime of an SSD by allowing storage capacity to gracefully reduce over time, thus preventing fail-slow symptoms. The CVSS comprises three key components (1) CV-SSD, an SSD that minimizes write amplification and gracefully reduces its exported capacity with age; (2) CV-FS, a log-structured file system for elastic logical partition; and (3) CV-manager, a user-level program that orchestrates system components based on the state of the storage system. We demonstrate the effectiveness of CVSS with synthetic and real workloads, showing significant improvements in latency, throughput, and lifetime compared to a fixed-capacity storage system. Specifically, under real workloads, CVSS reduces the latency, improves the throughput, and extends the lifetime by 8–53%, 49–316%, and 268–327%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们展示了基于闪存的固态硬盘 (SSD) 的容量可变存储系统 (CVSS) 的设计和实现。 CVSS 旨在通过允许存储容量随着时间的推移适度减少，从而防止故障缓慢症状，从而在 SSD 的整个生命周期内保持高性能。 CVSS 由三个关键组件组成：(1) CV-SSD，一种可以最大限度地减少写入放大并随着时间的推移适度减少其输出容量的 SSD； (2) CV-FS，弹性逻辑分区的日志结构文件系统； (3)CV-manager，一个用户级程序，根据存储系统的状态编排系统组件。我们通过合成和真实工作负载证明了 CVSS 的有效性，与固定容量存储系统相比，在延迟、吞吐量和生命周期方面显示出显着改进。具体来说，在实际工作负载下，CVSS 分别减少了延迟、提高了吞吐量并延长了生命周期 8-53%、49-316% 和 268-327%。

papers.title: We Ain't Afraid of No File Fragmentation: Causes and Prevention of Its Performance Impact on Modern Flash SSDs.
papers.abstract: A few studies reported that fragmentation still adversely affects the performance of flash solid-state disks (SSDs) particularly through request splitting. This research investigates the fragmentation-induced performance degradation across three levels: kernel I/O path, host-storage interface, and flash memory accesses in SSDs. Our analysis reveals that, contrary to assertions in existing literature, the primary cause of the degraded performance is not due to request splitting but stems from a significant increase in die-level collisions. In SSDs, when other writes come between writes of neighboring file blocks, the file blocks are not placed on consecutive dies, resulting in random die allocation. This randomness escalates the chances of die-level collisions, causing deteriorated read performance later. We also reveal that this may happen when a file is overwritten. To counteract this, we propose an NVMe command extension combined with a page-to-die allocation algorithm designed to ensure that contiguous blocks always land on successive dies, even in the face of file fragmentation or overwrites. Evaluations with commercial SSDs and an SSD emulator indicate that our approach effectively curtails the read performance drop arising from both fragmentation and overwrites, all without the need for defragmentation. Representatively, when a 162 MB SQLite database was fragmented into 10,011 pieces, our approach limited the performance drop to 3.5%, while the conventional system experienced a 40% decline.
papers.abstract_zh: 一些研究报告称，碎片仍然对闪存固态磁盘 (SSD) 的性能产生不利影响，特别是通过请求拆分。这项研究调查了三个层面上碎片引起的性能下降：内核 I/O 路径、主机存储接口和 SSD 中的闪存访问。我们的分析表明，与现有文献中的断言相反，性能下降的主要原因不是由于请求分割，而是源于芯片级冲突的显着增加。在 SSD 中，当其他写入发生在相邻文件块的写入之间时，文件块不会放置在连续的芯片上，从而导致随机芯片分配。这种随机性增加了芯片级冲突的可能性，从而导致随后的读取性能下降。我们还透露，当文件被覆盖时，可能会发生这种情况。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 NVMe 命令扩展与页到芯片分配算法的结合，旨在确保连续的块始终落在连续的芯片上，即使面对文件碎片或覆盖也是如此。对商用 SSD 和 SSD 模拟器的评估表明，我们的方法有效地减少了碎片和覆盖引起的读取性能下降，而且无需进行碎片整理。典型地，当一个 162 MB 的 SQLite 数据库被分割成 10,011 个片段时，我们的方法将性能下降限制在 3.5%，而传统系统则下降了 40%。

papers.title: What's the Story in EBS Glory: Evolutions and Lessons in Building Cloud Block Store.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we qualitatively and quantitatively discuss the design choices, production experience, and lessons in building the Elastic Block Storage (EBS) at Alibaba Cloud over the past decade. To cope with hardware advancement and users' demands, we shift our focus from design simplicity in EBS1 to high performance and space efficiency in EBS2, and finally reducing network traffic amplification in EBS3. In addition to the architectural evolutions, we also summarize the lessons and experiences in development as four topics, including: (i) achieving high elasticity in latency, throughput, IOPS and capacity; (ii) improving availability by minimizing the blast radius of individual, regional, and global failure events; (iii) identifying the motivations and key tradeoffs in various hardware offloading solutions; and (iv) identifying the pros/cons of the alternative solutions and explaining why seemingly promising ideas would not work in practice.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们定性和定量地讨论了过去十年在阿里云构建弹性块存储（EBS）的设计选择、生产经验和教训。为了应对硬件的进步和用户的需求，我们将重点从EBS1的设计简单性转向EBS2的高性能和空间效率，最后到EBS3的减少网络流量放大。除了架构演进之外，我们还将开发过程中的经验教训总结为四个主题，包括：（i）实现延迟、吞吐量、IOPS和容量的高弹性； (ii) 通过最小化个别、区域和全球故障事件的爆炸半径来提高可用性； (iii) 确定各种硬件卸载解决方案的动机和关键权衡； (iv) 确定替代解决方案的优缺点，并解释为什么看似有希望的想法在实践中行不通。

papers.title: ADOC: Automatically Harmonizing Dataflow Between Components in Log-Structured Key-Value Stores for Improved Performance.
papers.abstract: Log-Structure Merge-tree (LSM) based Key-Value (KV) systems are widely deployed. A widely acknowledged problem with LSM-KVs is write stalls, which refers to sudden performance drops under heavy write pressure. Prior studies have attributed write stalls to a particular cause such as a resource shortage or a scheduling issue. In this paper, we conduct a systematic study on the causes of write stalls by evaluating RocksDB with a variety of storage devices and show that the conclusions that focus on the individual aspects, though valid, are not generally applicable. Through a thorough review and further experiments with RocksDB, we show that data overflow, which refers to the rapid expansion of one or more components in an LSM-KV system due to a surge in data flow into one of the components, is able to explain the formation of write stalls. We contend that by balancing and harmonizing data flow among components, we will be able to reduce data overflow and thus, write stalls. As evidence, we propose a tuning framework called ADOC (Automatic Data Overflow Control) that automatically adjusts the system configurations, specifically, the number of threads and the batch size, to minimize data overflow in RocksDB. Our extensive experimental evaluations with RocksDB show that ADOC reduces the duration of write stalls by as much as 87.9% and improves performance by as much as 322.8% compared with the auto-tuned RocksDB. Compared to the manually optimized state-of-the-art SILK, ADOC achieves up to 66% higher throughput for the synthetic write-intensive workload that we used, while achieving comparable performance for the real-world YCSB workloads. However, SILK has to use over 20% more DRAM on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于日志结构合并树（LSM）的键值（KV）系统被广泛部署。 LSM-KV 的一个广泛承认的问题是写入停顿，这是指在高写入压力下性能突然下降。先前的研究已将写入停顿归因于特定原因，例如资源短缺或调度问题。在本文中，我们通过对多种存储设备的RocksDB进行评估，对写入停顿的原因进行了系统的研究，结果表明，侧重于个别方面的结论虽然有效，但并不普遍适用。通过对 RocksDB 的彻底审查和进一步实验，我们表明数据溢出（指 LSM-KV 系统中的一个或多个组件由于流入其中一个组件的数据激增而导致的快速扩展）能够解释写入停顿的形成。我们认为，通过平衡和协调组件之间的数据流，我们将能够减少数据溢出，从而减少写入停顿。作为证据，我们提出了一个名为 ADOC（自动数据溢出控制）的调优框架，该框架会自动调整系统配置，特别是线程数和批处理大小，以最大限度地减少 RocksDB 中的数据溢出。我们对 RocksDB 进行的广泛实验评估表明，与自动调优的 RocksDB 相比，ADOC 将写入停顿持续时间减少了 87.9%，性能提高了 322.8%。与手动优化的最先进的 SILK 相比，ADOC 为我们使用的合成写入密集型工作负载实现了高达 66% 的高吞吐量，同时为现实世​​界的 YCSB 工作负载实现了相当的性能。然而，SILK 平均需要多使用 20% 以上的 DRAM。

papers.title: Building and Operating a Pretty Big Storage System (My Adventures in Amazon S3).
papers.abstract: Five years ago I decided to leave my faculty position at UBC and join Amazon. A lot of that time has been spent working as an engineer on the S3 team. In this talk, I'm going to reflect on some of my experiences working on a cloud storage service, and in particular talk about what it's been like to build storage at the scale of S3. Now, we all know that S3 is pretty big and so it's probably not all that surprising to hear that I expected "scale" to be something that I'd learn a fair bit about when I decided to join. I was, however, a little surprised at some of the ways that scale would really factor into my role, and how it would show up in operating the business. So in the talk, we'll learn about building storage on large quantities of hard drives, and we'll also learn about some of the cultural, organizational, and personal dimensions of building, evolving, and running a really big storage system.
papers.abstract_zh: 五年前，我决定辞去 UBC 的教职并加入亚马逊。大部分时间都花在了 S3 团队的工程师身上。在本次演讲中，我将回顾我在云存储服务方面的一些工作经验，特别是谈论构建 S3 规模的存储的感受。现在，我们都知道 S3 相当大，所以当我决定加入时，听到我预计“规模”是我能学到很多知识的东西，这可能并不奇怪。然而，我对规模在我的角色中真正发挥作用的某些方式以及它在业务运营中的表现方式感到有点惊讶。因此，在演讲中，我们将了解如何在大量硬盘驱动器上构建存储，我们还将了解构建、发展和运行真正大型存储系统的一些文化、组织和个人维度。

papers.title: Citron: Distributed Range Lock Management with One-sided RDMA.
papers.abstract: Range lock enables concurrent accesses to disjoint parts of a shared storage. However, existing range lock managers rely on centralized CPU resources to process lock requests, which results in server-side CPU bottleneck and suboptimal performance when placed in a distributed scenario. We propose Citron, an RDMA-enabled distributed range lock manager that bypasses server-side CPUs by using only one-sided RDMA in range lock acquisition and release paths. Citron manages range locks with a static data structure called segment tree, which effectively accommodates dynamically located and sized ranges but only requires limited and nearly constant synchronization costs from the clients. Citron can also scale up itself in microseconds to adapt to a shared storage of a growing size at runtime. Evaluation shows that under various workloads, Citron delivers up to 3.05× throughput and 76.4% lower tail latency than CPU-based approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 范围锁允许对共享存储的不相交部分进行并发访问。然而，现有的范围锁管理器依赖集中式CPU资源来处理锁请求，这导致在分布式场景中出现服务器端CPU瓶颈和性能次优。我们提出了 Citron，这是一种支持 RDMA 的分布式范围锁定管理器，它通过在范围锁定获取和释放路径中仅使用单侧 RDMA 来绕过服务器端 CPU。 Citron 使用称为段树的静态数据结构来管理范围锁，该结构有效地适应动态定位和调整大小的范围，但只需要客户端有限且几乎恒定的同步成本。 Citron 还可以在微秒内进行自我扩展，以适应运行时大小不断增长的共享存储。评估表明，在各种工作负载下，Citron 的吞吐量比基于 CPU 的方法提高了 3.05 倍，尾部延迟降低了 76.4%。

papers.title: CJFS: Concurrent Journaling for Better Scalability.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose CJFS, \emph{Concurrent Journaling Filesystem}. CJFS extends EXT4 filesystem and addresses the fundamental limitations of the EXT4 journaling design, which are the main cause for the poor scalability of EXT4 filesystem. The heavy-weight EXT4 journal suffers from two limitations. First, the journal commit is a strictly serial activity. Second, the journal commit uses the original page cache entry, not the copy of it, and subsequently any access to the in-flight page cache entry is blocked. To address these limitations, we propose four techniques, namely Dual Thread Journaling, Multi-version Shadow Paging, Opportunistic Coalescing, and Compound Flush. With Dual Thread design, CJFS can commit a transaction before the preceding journal commit finishes. With Multi-version Shadow Paging, CJFS can be free from the transaction conflict even though there can exist multiple committing transactions. With Opportunistic Coalescing, CJFS can mitigate the transaction lock-up overhead in journal commit so that it can increase the coalescing degree -- i.e., the number of system calls associated with a single transaction -- of a running transaction. With Compound Flush, CJFS minimizes the number of flush calls. CJFS improves the throughput by 81%, 68% and 125% in filebench varmail, dbench, and OLTP-Insert on MySQL, respectively, against EXT4 by removing the transaction conflict and lock-up overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 CJFS，\emph{并发日志文件系统}。 CJFS 扩展了 EXT4 文件系统并解决了 EXT4 日志设计的基本限制，这些限制是 EXT4 文件系统可扩展性差的主要原因。重量级 EXT4 期刊有两个限制。首先，日志提交是严格的串行活动。其次，日志提交使用原始页面缓存条目，而不是其副本，随后对正在进行的页面缓存条目的任何访问都会被阻止。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了四种技术，即双线程日志、多版本影子分页、机会合并和复合刷新。通过双线程设计，CJFS 可以在前面的日志提交完成之前提交事务。通过多版本影子分页，即使可能存在多个提交事务，CJFS也可以免受事务冲突的影响。通过机会合并，CJFS 可以减轻日志提交中的事务锁定开销，从而可以增加正在运行的事务的合并程度（即与单个事务关联的系统调用数量）。通过复合刷新，CJFS 最大限度地减少了刷新调用的数量。通过消除事务冲突和锁定开销，CJFS 相对于 EXT4，分别将 MySQL 上的 filebench varmail、dbench 和 OLTP-Insert 的吞吐量提高了 81%、68% 和 125%。

papers.title: ConfD: Analyzing Configuration Dependencies of File Systems for Fun and Profit.
papers.abstract: File systems play an essential role in modern society for managing precious data. To meet diverse needs, they often support many configuration parameters. Such flexibility comes at the price of additional complexity which can lead to subtle configuration-related issues. To address this challenge, we study the configuration-related issues of two major file systems (i.e., Ext4 and XFS) in depth, and identify a prevalent pattern called multilevel configuration dependencies. Based on the study, we build an extensible tool called ConfD to extract the dependencies automatically, and create six plugins to address different configuration-related issues. Our experiments on Ext4 and XFS show that ConfD can extract more than 150 configuration dependencies for the file systems with a low false positive rate. Moreover, the dependency-guided plugins can identify various configuration issues (e.g., mishandling of configurations, regression test failures induced by valid configurations).
papers.abstract_zh: 文件系统在现代社会管理珍贵数据方面发挥着重要作用。为了满足不同的需求，它们通常支持许多配置参数。这种灵活性是以额外的复杂性为代价的，这可能会导致微妙的配置相关问题。为了应对这一挑战，我们深入研究了两个主要文件系统（即 Ext4 和 XFS）的配置相关问题，并确定了一种称为多级配置依赖关系的流行模式。基于研究，我们构建了一个名为 ConfD 的可扩展工具来自动提取依赖项，并创建了六个插件来解决不同的配置相关问题。我们在 Ext4 和 XFS 上的实验表明，ConfD 可以以较低的误报率提取文件系统的 150 多个配置依赖项。此外，依赖项引导的插件可以识别各种配置问题（例如，配置处理不当、有效配置引起的回归测试失败）。

papers.title: Fast Application Launch on Personal Computing/Communication Devices.
papers.abstract: We present Paralfetch, a novel prefetcher to speed up app launches on personal computing/communication devices by: 1) accurate collection of launch-related disk read requests, 2) pre-scheduling of these requests to improve I/O throughput during prefetching, and 3) overlapping app execution with disk prefetching for hiding disk access time from the app execution. We have implemented Paralfetch under Linux kernels on a desktop/laptop PC, a Raspberry Pi 3 board, and an Android smartphone. Tests with popular apps show that Paralfetch significantly reduces app launch times on flash-based drives, and outperforms GSoC Prefetch and FAST, which are representative app prefetchers available for Linux-based systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 Paralfetch，一种新颖的预取器，可通过以下方式加速应用程序在个人计算/通信设备上的启动：1) 准确收集与启动相关的磁盘读取请求，2) 预先安排这些请求以提高预取期间的 I/O 吞吐量，3) 将应用程序执行与磁盘预取重叠，以隐藏应用程序执行的磁盘访问时间。我们已经在台式机/笔记本电脑、Raspberry Pi 3 板和 Android 智能手机上的 Linux 内核下实现了 Paralfetch。对流行应用程序的测试表明，Paralfetch 显着缩短了基于闪存的驱动器上的应用程序启动时间，并且性能优于 GSoC Prefetch 和 FAST（它们是可用于基于 Linux 的系统的代表性应用程序预取器）。

papers.title: Fisc: A Large-scale Cloud-native-oriented File System.
papers.abstract: The wide adoption of Cloud Native shifts the boundary between cloud users and CSPs (Cloud Service Providers) from VM-based infrastructure to container-based applications. However, traditional file systems face challenges. First, the traditional file system (eg, Tectonic, Colossus, HDFS) clients are sophisticated and compete with the scarce resources in the application containers. Second, it is challenging for CSP to help the I/O pass from the containers to the storage clusters while guaranteeing their security, availability, and performance. To provide file system service for cloud-native applications, we design \system{}, a cloud-native-oriented file system. \system{}~ introduces four key designs: 1) a lightweight file system client in the container, 2) a DPU-based virtio-\system{}~device to implement the hardware offloading, 3) a storage-aware mechanism to address the I/O to the storage node to improve the I/O's availability and realizes local read, 4) a full path QoS mechanism to guarantee the QoS of hybrid deployed applications. \system{} has been deployed in production for over three years. It now serves cloud-native applications running over 3 million cores. Results show that \system{}~client only consumes 80% CPU resources compared to the traditional file system client. The production environment shows that the online searching task's latency is less than 500 $\mu$s when accessing the remote storage cluster.
papers.abstract_zh: 云原生的广泛采用将云用户和 CSP（云服务提供商）之间的边界从基于 VM 的基础设施转移到基于容器的应用程序。然而，传统的文件系统面临着挑战。首先，传统文件系统（例如，Tectonic、Colossus、HDFS）客户端非常复杂，并且与应用程序容器中的稀缺资源竞争。其次，CSP如何帮助I/O从容器传递到存储集群，同时保证其安全性、可用性和性能是一个挑战。为了给云原生应用提供文件系统服务，我们设计了一个面向云原生的文件系统\system{}。 \system{}~ 引入了四个关键设计：1）容器中的轻量级文件系统客户端，2）基于 DPU 的 virtio-\system{}~device 来实现硬件卸载，3）存储感知机制，将 I/O 寻址到存储节点，以提高 I/O 的可用性并实现本地读取，4）全路径 QoS 机制，以保证混合部署应用程序的 QoS。 \system{} 已在生产环境中部署了三年多。它现在为运行超过 300 万个核心的云原生应用程序提供服务。结果表明，与传统文件系统客户端相比，\system{}~client 仅消耗 80% 的 CPU 资源。生产环境显示，在线搜索任务访问远程存储集群时延低于500$\mu$s。

papers.title: FUSEE: A Fully Memory-Disaggregated Key-Value Store.
papers.abstract: Distributed in-memory key-value (KV) stores are embracing the disaggregated memory (DM) architecture for higher resource utilization. However, existing KV stores on DM employ a \emph{semi-disaggregated} design that stores KV pairs on DM but manages metadata with monolithic metadata servers, hence still suffering from low resource efficiency on metadata servers. To address this issue, this paper proposes FUSEE, a FUlly memory-diSaggrEgated KV StorE that brings disaggregation to metadata management. FUSEE replicates metadata, i.e., the index and memory management information, on memory nodes, manages them directly on the client side, and handles complex failures under the DM architecture. To scalably replicate the index on clients, FUSEE proposes a client-centric replication protocol that allows clients to concurrently access and modify the replicated index. To efficiently manage disaggregated memory, FUSEE adopts a two-level memory management scheme that splits the memory management duty among clients and memory nodes. Finally, to handle the metadata corruption under client failures, FUSEE leverages an embedded operation log scheme to repair metadata with low log maintenance overhead. We evaluate FUSEE with both micro and YCSB hybrid benchmarks. The experimental results show that FUSEE outperforms the state-of-the-art KV stores on DM by up to 4.5 times with less resource consumption.
papers.abstract_zh: 分布式内存中键值 (KV) 存储正在采用分解内存 (DM) 架构，以实现更高的资源利用率。然而，DM 上现有的 KV 存储采用半分解设计，将 KV 对存储在 DM 上，但使用整体元数据服务器管理元数据，因此元数据服务器上的资源效率仍然较低。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了 FUSEE，一种完全内存分解的 KV 存储，它为元数据管理带来了分解。 FUSEE将元数据，即索引和内存管理信息复制到内存节点上，直接在客户端进行管理，并在DM架构下处理复杂的故障。为了在客户端上可扩展地复制索引，FUSEE提出了一种以客户端为中心的复制协议，允许客户端同时访问和修改复制的索引。为了有效地管理分解内存，FUSEE采用两级内存管理方案，将内存管理职责分配给客户端和内存节点。最后，为了处理客户端故障下的元数据损坏，FUSEE 利用嵌入式操作日志方案以较低的日志维护开销修复元数据。我们使用 micro 和 YCSB 混合基准评估 FUSEE。实验结果表明，FUSEE 的性能比 DM 上最先进的 KV 存储高出 4.5 倍，而且资源消耗更少。

papers.title: GL-Cache: Group-level learning for efficient and high-performance caching.
papers.abstract: Web applications rely heavily on software caches to achieve low-latency, high-throughput services. To adapt to changing workloads, three types of learned caches (learned evictions) have been designed in recent years: object-level learning, learning-from-distribution, and learning-from-simple-experts. However, we argue that the learning granularity in existing approaches is either too fine (object-level), incurring significant computation and storage overheads, or too coarse (workload or expert-level) to capture the differences between objects and leaves a considerable efficiency gap. In this work, we propose a new approach for learning in caches (group-level learning), which clusters similar objects into groups and performs learning and eviction at the group level. Learning at the group level accumulates more signals for learning, leverages more features with adaptive weights, and amortizes overheads over objects, thereby achieving both high efficiency and high throughput. We designed and implemented GL-Cache on an open-source production cache to demonstrate group-level learning. Evaluations on 118 production block I/O and CDN cache traces show that GL-Cache has a higher hit ratio and higher throughput than state-of-the-art designs. Compared to LRB (object-level learning), GL-Cache improves throughput by 228$\times$ and hit ratio by 7\% on average across cache sizes. For 10\% of the traces (P90), GL-Cache provides a 25\% hit ratio increase from LRB. Compared to the best of all learned caches, GL-Cache achieves a 64\% higher throughput, a 3\% higher hit ratio on average, and a 13\% hit ratio increase at the P90.
papers.abstract_zh: Web 应用程序严重依赖软件缓存来实现低延迟、高吞吐量的服务。为了适应不断变化的工作负载，近年来设计了三种类型的学习缓存（学习驱逐）：对象级学习、分布学习和简单专家学习。然而，我们认为现有方法中的学习粒度要么太细（对象级），导致大量的计算和存储开销，要么太粗（工作负载或专家级），无法捕获对象之间的差异，并留下相当大的效率差距。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在缓存中学习的新方法（组级学习），它将相似的对象聚类成组，并在组级执行学习和驱逐。群体层面的学习可以积累更多的学习信号，通过自适应权重利用更多的特征，并分摊对象的开销，从而实现高效率和高吞吐量。我们在开源生产缓存上设计并实现了 GL-Cache，以演示组级学习。对 118 个生产块 I/O 和 CDN 缓存跟踪的评估表明，GL-Cache 比最先进的设计具有更高的命中率和吞吐量。与 LRB（对象级学习）相比，GL-Cache 在不同缓存大小上平均将吞吐量提高了 228$\times$，命中率提高了 7\%。对于 10% 的跟踪 (P90)，GL-Cache 的命中率比 LRB 提高了 25%。与所有学习缓存中最好的相比，GL-Cache 的吞吐量提高了 64%，平均命中率提高了 3%，在 P90 上命中率提高了 13%。

papers.title: HadaFS: A File System Bridging the Local and Shared Burst Buffer for Exascale Supercomputers.
papers.abstract: Current supercomputers introduce SSDs to form a Burst Buffer (BB) layer to meet the HPC application’s growing I/O requirements. BBs can be divided into two types by deployment location. One is the local BB, which is known for its scalability and performance. The other is the shared BB, which has the advantage of data sharing and deployment costs. How to unify the advantages of the local BB and the shared BB is a key issue in the HPC community. We propose a novel BB file system named HadaFS that provides the advantages of local BB deployments to shared BB deployments. First, HadaFS offers a new Localized Triage Architecture (LTA) to solve the problem of ultra-scale expansion and data sharing. Then, HadaFS proposes a full-path indexing approach with three metadata synchronization strategies to solve the problem of complex metadata management of traditional file systems and mismatch with the application I/O behaviors. Moreover, HadaFS integrates a data management tool named Hadash, which supports efficient data query in the BB and accelerates data migration between the BB and traditional HPC storage. HadaFS has been deployed on the Sunway New-generation Supercomputer (SNS), serving hundreds of applications and supporting a maximum of 600,000-client scaling.
papers.abstract_zh: 当前的超级计算机引入SSD来形成突发缓冲区（BB）层，以满足HPC应用程序不断增长的I/O需求。 BB按部署位置可分为两种类型。一种是本地BB，以其可扩展性和性能着称。另一种是共享BB，其优点是数据共享和部署成本。如何统一本地BB和共享BB的优势是HPC社区的一个关键问题。我们提出了一种名为 HadaFS 的新型 BB 文件系统，它提供了本地 BB 部署与共享 BB 部署的优势。首先，HadaFS提供了新的本地化分类架构（LTA）来解决超大规模扩展和数据共享的问题。然后，HadaFS提出了一种具有三种元数据同步策略的全路径索引方法，以解决传统文件系统元数据管理复杂以及与应用程序I/O行为不匹配的问题。此外，HadaFS还集成了Hadash数据管理工具，支持BB内的高效数据查询，加速BB与传统HPC存储之间的数据迁移。 HadaFS已部署在神威新一代超级计算机（SNS）上，服务于数百个应用程序，支持最大60万客户端扩展。

papers.title: InftyDedup: Scalable and Cost-Effective Cloud Tiering with Deduplication.
papers.abstract: Cloud tiering is the process of moving selected data from on-premise storage to the cloud, which has recently become important for backup solutions. As subsequent backups usually contain repeating data, deduplication in cloud tiering can significantly reduce cloud storage utilization, and hence costs. In this paper, we introduce InftyDedup, a novel system for cloud tiering with deduplication. Unlike existing solutions, it maximizes scalability by utilizing cloud services not only for storage but also for computation. Following a distributed batch approach with dynamically assigned cloud computation resources, InftyDedup can deduplicate multi-petabyte backups from multiple sources at costs on the order of a couple of dollars. Moreover, by selecting between hot and cold cloud storage based on the characteristics of each data chunk, our solution further reduces the overall costs by up to 26%–44%. InftyDedup is implemented in a state-of-the-art commercial backup system and evaluated in the cloud of a hyperscaler.
papers.abstract_zh: 云分层是将选定数据从本地存储移动到云的过程，这最近对于备份解决方案变得非常重要。由于后续备份通常包含重复数据，云分层中的重复数据删除可以显着降低云存储利用率，从而降低成本。在本文中，我们介绍了 InftyDedup，这是一种具有重复数据删除功能的云分层新型系统。与现有解决方案不同，它不仅利用云服务进行存储，而且还进行计算，从而最大限度地提高可扩展性。采用动态分配云计算资源的分布式批处理方法，InftyDedup 可以以几美元的成本从多个来源删除多 PB 备份的重复数据。此外，通过根据每个数据块的特征选择热云存储和冷云存储，我们的解决方案进一步将总体成本降低了26%–44%。 InftyDedup 在最先进的商业备份系统中实施，并在超大规模企业的云中进行评估。

papers.title: Integrated Host-SSD Mapping Table Management for Improving User Experience of Smartphones.
papers.abstract: Host Performance Booster (HPB) was proposed to improve the performance of high-capacity mobile flash storage systems by utilizing unused host DRAM memory. In this paper, we investigate how HPB should be managed so that the user experience of smartphones can be enhanced from HPB-enabled high-performance mobile storage systems. From our empirical study on Android environments, we identified two requirements for an efficient HPB management scheme in smartphones. First, HPB should be managed in a foreground app-centric manner so that the user-perceived latency can be greatly reduced. Second, the capacity of the HPB memory should be dynamically adjusted so as not to degrade the user experience of the foreground app. As an efficient HPB management solution that meets the identified requirements, we propose an integrated host-SSD mapping table management scheme, HPBvalve, for smartphones. HPBvalve prioritizes the foreground app in managing mapping table entries in the HPB memory. HPBvalve dynamically resizes the overall capacity of the HPB memory depending on the memory pressure status of the smartphone. Our experimental results using the prototype implementation demonstrate that HPBvalve improves UX-critical app launching time by up to 43% (250 ms) over the existing HPB management scheme, without negatively affecting memory pressure. Meanwhile, the L2P mapping misses are alleviated by up to 78%.
papers.abstract_zh: 主机性能助推器（HPB）被提出来通过利用未使用的主机 DRAM 内存来提高大容量移动闪存存储系统的性能。在本文中，我们研究了如何管理 HPB，以便可以通过支持 HPB 的高性能移动存储系统来增强智能手机的用户体验。根据我们对 Android 环境的实证研究，我们确定了智能手机中高效 HPB 管理方案的两个要求。首先，HPB应该以前台应用程序为中心的方式进行管理，这样可以大大减少用户感知的延迟。其次，HPB内存的容量应该动态调整，以免降低前台应用的用户体验。作为满足既定要求的高效HPB管理解决方案，我们提出了一种适用于智能手机的集成主机-SSD映射表管理方案HPBvalve。 HPBvalve 在管理 HPB 内存中的映射表条目时优先考虑前台应用程序。 HPBvalve 根据智能手机的内存压力状态动态调整 HPB 内存的总体容量。我们使用原型实现的实验结果表明，与现有 HPB 管理方案相比，HPBvalve 将用户体验关键型应用程序启动时间缩短了 43%（250 毫秒），并且不会对内存压力产生负面影响。同时，L2P 映射缺失减少高达 78%。

papers.title: Intelligent Resource Scheduling for Co-located Latency-critical Services: A Multi-Model Collaborative Learning Approach.
papers.abstract: Latency-critical services have been widely deployed in cloud environments. For cost-efficiency, multiple services are usually co-located on a server. Thus, run-time resource scheduling becomes the pivot for QoS control in these complicated co-location cases. However, the scheduling exploration space enlarges rapidly with the increasing server resources, making the schedulers hardly provide ideal solutions quickly. More importantly, we observe that there are “resource cliffs” in the scheduling exploration space. They affect the exploration efficiency and always lead to severe QoS fluctuations in previous schedulers. To address these problems, we propose a novel ML-based intelligent scheduler – OSML. It learns the correlation between architectural hints (e.g., IPC, cache misses, memory footprint, etc.), scheduling solutions and the QoS demands based on a data set we collected from 11 widely deployed services running on off-the-shelf servers. OSML employs multiple ML models to work collaboratively to predict QoS variations, shepherd the scheduling, and recover from QoS violations in complicated co-location cases. OSML can intelligently avoid resource cliffs during scheduling and reach an optimal solution much faster than previous approaches for co-located LC services. Experimental results show that OSML supports higher loads and meets QoS targets with lower scheduling overheads and shorter convergence time than previous studies.
papers.abstract_zh: 延迟关键型服务已广泛部署在云环境中。为了提高成本效率，多个服务通常位于一台服务器上。因此，在这些复杂的共置情况下，运行时资源调度成为 QoS 控制的关键。然而，随着服务器资源的增加，调度探索空间迅速扩大，使得调度器很难快速提供理想的解决方案。更重要的是，我们观察到调度探索空间中存在“资源悬崖”。它们影响探索效率并且总是导致先前调度器的严重QoS波动。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于机器学习的智能调度器——OSML。它根据我们从在现成服务器上运行的 11 个广泛部署的服务收集的数据集，了解架构提示（例如，IPC、缓存未命中、内存占用等）、调度解决方案和 QoS 需求之间的相关性。 OSML 采用多个 ML 模型协同工作，以预测 QoS 变化、引导调度，并在复杂的共置情况下从 QoS 违规中恢复。 OSML 可以智能地避免调度期间的资源悬崖，并比以前的共址 LC 服务方法更快地找到最佳解决方案。实验结果表明，与之前的研究相比，OSML 支持更高的负载并满足 QoS 目标，同时具有更低的调度开销和更短的收敛时间。

papers.title: MadFS: Per-File Virtualization for Userspace Persistent Memory Filesystems.
papers.abstract: Persistent memory (PM) can be accessed directly from userspace without kernel involvement, but most PM filesystems still perform metadata operations in the kernel for security and rely on the kernel for cross-process synchronization. We present per-file virtualization, where a virtualization layer implements a complete set of file functionalities, including metadata management, crash consistency, and concurrency control, in userspace. We observe that not all file metadata need to be maintained by the kernel and propose embedding insensitive metadata into the file for userspace management. For crash consistency, copy-on-write (CoW) benefits from the embedding of the block mapping since the mapping can be efficiently updated without kernel involvement. For cross-process synchronization, we introduce lock-free optimistic concurrency control (OCC) at user level, which tolerates process crashes and provides better scalability. Based on per-file virtualization, we implement MadFS, a library PM filesystem that maintains the embedded metadata as a compact log. Experimental results show that on concurrent workloads, MadFS achieves up to 3.6× the throughput of ext4-DAX. For real-world applications, MadFS provides up to 48% speedup for YCSB on LevelDB and 85% for TPC-C on SQLite compared to NOVA.
papers.abstract_zh: 持久内存（PM）可以直接从用户空间访问，无需内核参与，但大多数 PM 文件系统出于安全考虑仍然在内核中执行元数据操作，并依赖内核进行跨进程同步。我们提出了每文件虚拟化，其中虚拟化层在用户空间中实现了一整套文件功能，包括元数据管理、崩溃一致性和并发控制。我们观察到并非所有文件元数据都需要由内核维护，并建议将不敏感的元数据嵌入到文件中以进行用户空间管理。为了实现崩溃一致性，写时复制 (CoW) 受益于块映射的嵌入，因为无需内核参与即可有效更新映射。对于跨进程同步，我们在用户级别引入了无锁乐观并发控制（OCC），它可以容忍进程崩溃并提供更好的可扩展性。基于每个文件虚拟化，我们实现了 MadFS，这是一个库 PM 文件系统，它将嵌入式元数据维护为紧凑日志。实验结果表明，在并发工作负载上，MadFS 的吞吐量高达 ext4-DAX 的 3.6 倍。对于实际应用程序，与 NOVA 相比，MadFS 为 LevelDB 上的 YCSB 提供高达 48% 的加速，为 SQLite 上的 TPC-C 提供高达 85% 的加速。

papers.title: More Than Capacity: Performance-oriented Evolution of Pangu in Alibaba.
papers.abstract: This paper presents how the Pangu storage system continuously evolves with hardware technologies and the business model to provide high-performance, reliable storage services with a 100-microsecond level of I/O latency. Pangu’s evolution includes two phases. In the first phase, Pangu embraces the emergence of the solid-state drive (SSD) storage and remote direct memory access (RDMA) network technologies by innovating its file system and designing a user-space storage operating system to substantially reduce the I/O latency while providing high throughput and IOPS. In the second phase, Pangu evolves from a volume-oriented storage provider to a performance-oriented one. To adapt to this change of business model, Pangu upgrades its infrastructure with storage servers of much higher SSD volume and RDMA bandwidth from 25Gbps to 100Gbps. It introduces a series of key designs, including traffic amplification reduction, remote direct cache access, and CPU computation offloading, to ensure Pangu fully harvests the performance improvement brought by hardware upgrade. Other than introducing these technology innovations, we also share our operating experiences during Pangu’s evolution, and discuss important lessons learned from them.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了盘古存储系统如何随着硬件技术和商业模式的不断演进，提供高性能、可靠、I/O延迟达到100微秒级的存储服务。盘古的演化包括两个阶段。在第一阶段，盘古通过创新文件系统和设计用户空间存储操作系统来拥抱固态硬盘（SSD）存储和远程直接内存访问（RDMA）网络技术的出现，以大幅减少I/O延迟，同时提供高吞吐量和IOPS。第二阶段，盘古从面向卷的存储提供商演变为面向性能的存储提供商。为了适应这种商业模式的变化，盘古升级了其基础设施，使用了更高SSD容量的存储服务器和RDMA带宽从25Gbps到100Gbps。引入了降低流量放大、远程直接缓存访问、CPU计算分流等一系列关键设计，确保盘古充分收获硬件升级带来的性能提升。除了介绍这些技术创新之外，我们还分享了盘古演化过程中的运营经验，并讨论了其中的重要教训。

papers.title: Multi-view Feature-based SSD Failure Prediction: What, When, and Why.
papers.abstract: Solid state drives (SSDs) play an important role in large-scale data centers. SSD failures affect the stability of storage systems and cause additional maintenance overhead. To predict and handle SSD failures in advance, this paper proposes a multi-view and multi-task random forest (MVTRF) scheme. MVTRF predicts SSD failures based on multi-view features extracted from both long-term and short-term monitoring data of SSDs. Particularly, multi-task learning is adopted to simultaneously predict what type of failure it is and when it will occur through the same model. We also extract the key decisions of MVTRF to analyze why the failure will occur. These details of failure would be useful for verifying and handling SSD failures. The proposed MVTRF is evaluated on the large-scale real data from data centers. The experimental results show that MVTRF has higher failure prediction accuracy and improves precision by 46.1% and recall by 57.4% on average compared with the existing schemes. The results also demonstrate the effectiveness of MVTRF on failure type and time prediction and failure cause identification, which helps to improve the efficiency of failure handling.
papers.abstract_zh: 固态硬盘（SSD）在大型数据中心中发挥着重要作用。 SSD故障会影响存储系统的稳定性并带来额外的维护开销。为了提前预测和处理SSD故障，本文提出了一种多视图多任务随机森林（MVTRF）方案。 MVTRF基于从SSD的长期和短期监测数据中提取的多视图特征来预测SSD故障。特别是，采用多任务学习，通过同一模型同时预测故障类型以及何时发生。我们还提取了 MVTRF 的关键决策来分析为什么会发生故障。这些故障详细信息对于验证和处理 SSD 故障非常有用。所提出的 MVTRF 在来自数据中心的大规模真实数据上进行评估。实验结果表明，MVTRF具有更高的故障预测精度，与现有方案相比，准确率平均提高了46.1%，召回率平均提高了57.4%。结果还证明了MVRTF在故障类型和时间预测以及故障原因识别方面的有效性，有助于提高故障处理效率。

papers.title: NVMeVirt: A Versatile Software-defined Virtual NVMe Device.
papers.abstract: There have been drastic changes in the storage device landscape recently. At the center of the diverse storage landscape lies the NVMe interface, which allows high-performance and flexible communication models required by these next-generation device types. However, its hardware-oriented definition and specification are bottlenecking the development and evaluation cycle for new revolutionary storage devices. In this paper, we present NVMeVirt, a novel approach to facilitate software-defined NVMe devices. A user can define any NVMe device type with custom features, and NVMeVirt allows it to bridge the gap between the host I/O stack and the virtual NVMe device in software. We demonstrate the advantages and features of NVMeVirt by realizing various storage types and configurations, such as conventional SSDs, low-latency high-bandwidth NVM SSDs, zoned namespace SSDs, and key-value SSDs with the support of PCI peer-to-peer DMA and NVMe-oF target offloading. We also make cases for storage research with NVMeVirt, such as studying the performance characteristics of database engines and extending the NVMe specification for the improved key-value SSD performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近，存储设备格局发生了巨大变化。 NVMe 接口位于多样化存储格局的中心，它支持这些下一代设备类型所需的高性能和灵活的通信模型。然而，其面向硬件的定义和规范正在成为新的革命性存储设备的开发和评估周期的瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了 NVMeVirt，这是一种促进软件定义 NVMe 设备的新颖方法。用户可以使用自定义功能定义任何 NVMe 设备类型，NVMeVirt 允许它在软件中弥合主机 I/O 堆栈和虚拟 NVMe 设备之间的差距。我们通过实现各种存储类型和配置来展示 NVMeVirt 的优势和特性，例如传统 SSD、低延迟高带宽 NVM SSD、分区命名空间 SSD 以及支持 PCI 点对点 DMA 和 NVMe-oF 目标卸载的键值 SSD。我们还利用 NVMeVirt 进行存储研究，例如研究数据库引擎的性能特征以及扩展 NVMe 规范以提高键值 SSD 性能。

papers.title: On Stacking a Persistent Memory File System on Legacy File Systems.
papers.abstract: In this work, we design and implement a Stackable Persistent memory File System (SPFS), which serves NVMM as a persistent writeback cache to NVMM-oblivious filesystems. SPFS can be stacked on a disk-optimized file system to improve I/O performance by absorbing frequent order-preserving small synchronous writes in NVMM while also exploiting the VFS cache of the underlying disk-optimized file system for non-synchronous writes. A stackable file system must be lightweight in that it manages only NVMM and not the disk or VFS cache. Therefore, SPFS manages all file system metadata including extents using simple but highly efficient dynamic hash tables. To manage extents using hash tables, we design a novel Extent Hashing algorithm that exhibits fast insertion as well as fast scan performance. Our performance study shows that SPFS effectively improves I/O performance of the lower file system by up to 9.9×.
papers.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们设计并实现了一个可堆叠持久内存文件系统（SPFS），它将 NVMM 作为 NVMM 不可见文件系统的持久写回缓存。 SPFS 可以堆叠在磁盘优化的文件系统上，通过吸收 NVMM 中频繁的保序小型同步写入来提高 I/O 性能，同时还利用底层磁盘优化文件系统的 VFS 缓存进行非同步写入。可堆叠文件系统必须是轻量级的，因为它仅管理 NVMM，而不管理磁盘或 VFS 缓存。因此，SPFS 使用简单但高效的动态哈希表来管理包括范围在内的所有文件系统元数据。为了使用哈希表管理范围，我们设计了一种新颖的范围散列算法，该算法具有快速插入和快速扫描性能。我们的性能研究表明，SPFS 有效地将下层文件系统的 I/O 性能提高了 9.9 倍。

papers.title: ParaRC: Embracing Sub-Packetization for Repair Parallelization in MSR-Coded Storage.
papers.abstract: Minimum-storage regenerating (MSR) codes are provably optimal erasure codes that minimize the repair bandwidth (i.e., the amount of traffic being transferred during a repair operation), with the minimum storage redundancy, in distributed storage systems. However, the practical repair performance of MSR codes still has significant room to improve, as the mathematical structure of MSR codes makes their repair operations difficult to parallelize. We present ParaRC, a parallel repair framework for MSR codes. ParaRC exploits the sub-packetization nature of MSR codes to parallelize the repair of sub-blocks and balance the repair load (i.e., the amount of traffic sent or received by a node) across the available nodes. We show that there exists a trade-off between the repair bandwidth and the maximum repair load, and further propose a fast heuristic that approximately minimizes the maximum repair load with limited search time for large coding parameters. We prototype our heuristic in ParaRC and show that ParaRC reduces the degraded read and full-node recovery times over the conventional centralized repair approach in MSR codes by up to 59.3% and 39.2%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 最小存储再生（MSR）码是经过证明的最佳纠删码，它可以在分布式存储系统中最小化修复带宽（即修复操作期间传输的流量），并具有最小的存储冗余。然而，MSR 代码的实际修复性能仍然有很大的改进空间，因为 MSR 代码的数学结构使其修复操作难以并行化。我们提出了 ParaRC，一个 MSR 代码的并行修复框架。 ParaRC 利用 MSR 代码的子分组特性来并行化子块的修复并平衡可用节点之间的修复负载（即节点发送或接收的流量量）。我们证明修复带宽和最大修复负载之间存在权衡，并进一步提出了一种快速启发式，可以在有限的搜索时间下对大编码参数近似最小化最大修复负载。我们在 ParaRC 中对启发式进行了原型设计，结果表明，与 MSR 代码中的传统集中式修复方法相比，ParaRC 分别将降级读取和全节点恢复时间减少了 59.3% 和 39.2%。

papers.title: Patronus: High-Performance and Protective Remote Memory.
papers.abstract: RDMA-enabled remote memory (RM) systems are gaining popularity with improved memory utilization and elasticity. However, since it is commonly believed that fine-grained RDMA permission management is impractical, existing RM systems forgo memory protection, an indispensable property in a real-world deployment. In this paper, we propose PATRONUS, an RM system that can simultaneously offer protection and high performance. PATRONUS introduces a fast permission management mechanism by exploiting advanced RDMA hardware features with a set of elaborate software techniques. Moreover, to retain the high performance under exception scenarios (e.g., client failures, illegal access), PATRONUS attaches microsecond-scaled leases to permission and reserves spare RDMA resources for fast recovery. We evaluate PATRONUS over two one-sided data structures and two function-as-a-service (FaaS) applications. The experiment shows that the protection only brings 2.4% to 27.7% overhead among all the workloads, and our system performs at most ×5.2 than the best competitor.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着内存利用率和弹性的提高，支持 RDMA 的远程内存 (RM) 系统越来越受欢迎。然而，由于人们普遍认为细粒度的 RDMA 权限管理不切实际，因此现有的 RM 系统放弃了内存保护，而内存保护是现实部署中不可或缺的属性。在本文中，我们提出了PATRONUS，一种可以同时提供保护和高性能的RM系统。 PATRONUS 通过利用先进的 RDMA 硬件功能和一组精心设计的软件技术，引入了快速权限管理机制。此外，为了在异常情况下（例如客户端故障、非法访问）保持高性能，PATRONUS将微秒级的租约附加到权限上，并保留备用的RDMA资源以用于快速恢复。我们通过两个单方面的数据结构和两个功能即服务（FaaS）应用程序来评估 PATRONUS。实验表明，这种保护只带来了所有工作负载的2.4%到27.7%的开销，而我们的系统的性能最多比最好的竞争对手高出5.2倍。

papers.title: Perseus: A Fail-Slow Detection Framework for Cloud Storage Systems.
papers.abstract: The newly-emerging ''fail-slow'' failures plague both software and hardware where the victim components are still functioning yet with degraded performance. To address this problem, this paper presents Perseus, a practical fail-slow detection framework for storage devices. Perseus leverages a light regression-based model to fast pinpoint and analyze fail-slow failures at the granularity of drives. Within a 10-month close monitoring on 248K drives, Perseus managed to find 304 fail-slow cases. Isolating them can reduce the (node-level) 99.99th tail latency by 48%. We assemble a large-scale fail-slow dataset (including 41K normal drives and 315 verified fail-slow drives) from our production traces, based on which we provide root cause analysis on fail-slow drives covering a variety of ill-implemented scheduling, hardware defects, and environmental factors. We have released the dataset to the public for fail-slow study.
papers.abstract_zh: 新出现的“慢速失败”故障同时困扰着软件和硬件，其中受害组件仍在运行，但性能下降。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了 Perseus，一种实用的存储设备故障缓慢检测框架。 Perseus 利用基于轻型回归的模型来快速查明和分析驱动器粒度的慢速故障。在对 248K 驱动器进行 10 个月的密切监控后，Perseus 成功发现了 304 个故障缓慢案例。隔离它们可以将（节点级）第 99.99 尾延迟减少 48%。我们根据生产轨迹组装了一个大规模的fail-slow数据集（包括41K正常驱动器和315个经过验证的fail-slow驱动器），基于该数据集，我们提供了fail-slow驱动器的根本原因分析，涵盖了各种实施不当的调度、硬件缺陷和环境因素。我们已向公众发布了数据集以进行慢速失败研究。

papers.title: Practical Design Considerations for Wide Locally Recoverable Codes (LRCs).
papers.abstract: Most of the data in large-scale storage clusters is erasure coded. At exascale, optimizing erasure codes for low storage overhead, efficient reconstruction, and easy deployment is of critical importance. Locally recoverable codes (LRCs) have deservedly gained central importance in this field, because they can balance many of these requirements. In our work we study wide LRCs; LRCs with large number of blocks per stripe and low storage overhead. These codes are a natural next step for practitioners to unlock higher storage savings, but they come with their own challenges. Of particular interest is their reliability , since wider stripes are prone to more simultaneous failures. We conduct a practically-minded analysis of several popular and novel LRCs. We find that wide LRC reliability is a subtle phenomenon that is sensitive to several design choices, some of which are overlooked by theoreticians, and others by practitioners. Based on these insights, we construct novel LRCs called Uniform Cauchy LRCs , which show excellent performance in simulations, and a 33% improvement in reliability on unavailability events observed by a wide LRC deployed in a Google storage cluster. We also show that these codes are easy to deploy in a manner that improves their robustness to common maintenance events. Along the way, we also give a remarkably simple and novel construction of distance optimal LRCs (other constructions are also known), which may be of interest to theory-minded readers.
papers.abstract_zh: 大规模存储集群中的大部分数据都是纠删码的。在百亿亿级计算中，优化纠删码以实现低存储开销、高效重建和易于部署至关重要。本地可恢复代码（LRC）在该领域理所当然地获得了核心重要性，因为它们可以平衡许多这些要求。在我们的工作中，我们研究了广泛的 LRC； LRC 每个条带具有大量块且存储开销低。这些代码是从业者释放更高存储节省的自然下一步，但它们也面临着自己的挑战。特别值得关注的是它们的可靠性，因为较宽的条带容易同时发生更多故障。我们对几个流行的新颖的 LRC 进行了务实的分析。我们发现，宽 LRC 可靠性是一种微妙的现象，对多种设计选择敏感，其中一些被理论家忽视，另一些被实践者忽视。基于这些见解，我们构建了称为统一柯西 LRC 的新型 LRC，它在模拟中表现出出色的性能，并且将部署在 Google 存储集群中的广泛 LRC 观察到的不可用事件的可靠性提高了 33%。我们还表明，这些代码易于部署，从而提高了它们对常见维护事件的鲁棒性。在此过程中，我们还给出了一种非常简单且新颖的距离最优 LRC 构造（其他构造也是已知的），这可能会引起理论读者的兴趣。

papers.title: Revitalizing the Forgotten On-Chip DMA to Expedite Data Movement in NVM-based Storage Systems.
papers.abstract: Data-intensive applications executing on NVM-based storage systems experience serious bottlenecks when moving data between DRAM and NVM. We advocate for the use of the long-existing but recently neglected on-chip DMA to expedite data movement with three contributions. First, we explore new latency-oriented optimization directions, driven by a comprehensive DMA study, to design a high-performance DMA module, which significantly lowers the I/O size threshold to observe benefits. Second, we propose a new data movement engine, Fastmove, that coordinates the use of the DMA along with the CPU with judicious scheduling and load splitting such that the DMA’s limitations are compensated, and the overall gains are maximized. Finally, with a general kernel-based design, simple APIs, and DAX file system integration, Fastmove allows applications to transparently exploit the DMA and its new features without code change. We run three data-intensive applications MySQL, GraphWalker, and Filebench atop NOVA, ext4-DAX, and XFS-DAX, with standard benchmarks like TPC-C, and popular graph algorithms like PageRank. Across single- and multi-socket settings, compared to the conventional CPU-only NVM accesses, Fastmove introduces to TPC-C with MySQL 1.13-2.16× speedups of peak throughput, reduces the average latency by 17.7-60.8%, and saves 37.1-68.9% CPU usage spent in data movement. It also shortens the execution time of graph algorithms with GraphWalker by 39.7-53.4%, and introduces 1.12-1.27× throughput speedups for Filebench.
papers.abstract_zh: 在基于 NVM 的存储系统上执行的数据密集型应用程序在 DRAM 和 NVM 之间移动数据时会遇到严重的瓶颈。我们提倡使用长期存在但最近被忽视的片上 DMA 来加速数据移动，有以下三个贡献。首先，我们在全面的 DMA 研究的推动下探索新的面向延迟的优化方向，以设计高性能 DMA 模块，从而显着降低 I/O 大小阈值以观察效益。其次，我们提出了一种新的数据移动引擎 Fastmove，它通过明智的调度和负载分配来协调 DMA 与 CPU 的使用，从而补偿 DMA 的局限性，并使总体收益最大化。最后，凭借基于通用内核的设计、简单的 API 和 DAX 文件系统集成，Fastmove 允许应用程序透明地利用 DMA 及其新功能，而无需更改代码。我们在 NOVA、ext4-DAX 和 XFS-DAX 上运行三个数据密集型应用程序 MySQL、GraphWalker 和 Filebench，并使用 TPC-C 等标准基准测试和 PageRank 等流行的图形算法。在单插槽和多插槽设置中，与传统的仅 CPU NVM 访问相比，Fastmove 引入了 TPC-C with MySQL 1.13-2.16 倍的峰值吞吐量加速，平均延迟降低了 17.7-60.8%，并节省了 37.1-68.9% 的数据移动 CPU 使用率。它还将 GraphWalker 的图形算法的执行时间缩短了 39.7-53.4%，并为 Filebench 引入了 1.12-1.27 倍的吞吐量加速。

papers.title: ROLEX: A Scalable RDMA-oriented Learned Key-Value Store for Disaggregated Memory Systems.
papers.abstract: Disaggregated memory systems separate monolithic servers into different components, including compute and memory nodes, to enjoy the benefits of high resource utilization, flexible hardware scalability, and efficient data sharing. By exploiting the high-performance RDMA (Remote Direct Memory Access), the compute nodes directly access the remote memory pool without involving remote CPUs. Hence, the ordered key-value (KV) stores (e.g., B-trees and learned indexes) keep all data sorted to provide rang query service via the high-performance network. However, existing ordered KVs fail to work well on the disaggregated memory systems, due to either consuming multiple network roundtrips to search the remote data or heavily relying on the memory nodes equipped with insufficient computing resources to process data modifications. In this paper, we propose a scalable RDMA-oriented KV store with learned indexes, called ROLEX, to coalesce the ordered KV store in the disaggregated systems for efficient data storage and retrieval. ROLEX leverages a retraining-decoupled learned index scheme to dissociate the model retraining from data modification operations via adding a bias and some data-movement constraints to learned models. Based on the operation decoupling, data modifications are directly executed in compute nodes via one-sided RDMA verbs with high scalability. The model retraining is hence removed from the critical path of data modification and asynchronously executed in memory nodes by using dedicated computing resources. Our experimental results on YCSB and real-world workloads demonstrate that ROLEX achieves competitive performance on the static workloads, as well as significantly improving the performance on dynamic workloads by up to 2.2 times than state-of-the-art schemes on the disaggregated memory systems. We have released the open-source codes for public use in GitHub.
papers.abstract_zh: 分解的内存系统将单片服务器分成不同的组件，包括计算和内存节点，以享受高资源利用率、灵活的硬件可扩展性和高效的数据共享的好处。通过利用高性能RDMA（远程直接内存访问），计算节点可以直接访问远程内存池，而不需要远程CPU的参与。因此，有序键值（KV）存储（例如，B树和学习索引）使所有数据保持排序，以通过高性能网络提供范围查询服务。然而，现有的有序 KV 无法在分解的内存系统上很好地工作，因为要么消耗多次网络往返来搜索远程数据，要么严重依赖配备不足计算资源的内存节点来处理数据修改。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有学习索引的可扩展的面向 RDMA 的 KV 存储，称为 ROLEX，以合并分类系统中的有序 KV 存储，以实现高效的数据存储和检索。 ROLEX 利用重新训练解耦的学习索引方案，通过向学习模型添加偏差和一些数据移动约束，将模型重新训练与数据修改操作分离。基于操作解耦，数据修改通过单侧RDMA动词直接在计算节点中执行，具有高可扩展性。因此，模型重新训练从数据修改的关键路径中移除，并通过使用专用计算资源在内存节点中异步执行。我们在 YCSB 和实际工作负载上的实验结果表明，ROLEX 在静态工作负载上实现了具有竞争力的性能，并且在动态工作负载上的性能显着提高，比分解内存系统上最先进的方案提高了 2.2 倍。我们已在 GitHub 上发布了开源代码供公众使用。

papers.title: SHADE: Enable Fundamental Cacheability for Distributed Deep Learning Training.
papers.abstract: Deep learning training (DLT) applications exhibit unique I/O workload behaviors that pose new challenges for storage system design. DLT is I/O intensive since data samples need to be fetched continuously from a remote storage. Accelerators such as GPUs have been extensively used to support these applications. As accelerators become more powerful and more data-hungry, the I/O performance lags behind. This creates a crucial performance bottleneck, especially in distributed DLT. At the same time, the exponentially growing dataset sizes make it impossible to store these datasets entirely in memory. While today's DLT frameworks typically use a random sampling policy that treat all samples uniformly equally, recent findings indicate that not all samples are equally important and different data samples contribute differently towards improving the accuracy of a model. This observation creates an opportunity for DLT I/O optimizations by exploiting the data locality enabled by importance sampling. To this end, we design and implement SHADE, a new DLT-aware caching system that detects fine-grained importance variations at per-sample level and leverages the variance to make informed caching decisions for a distributed DLT job. SHADE adopts a novel, rank-based approach, which captures the relative importance of data samples across different minibatches. SHADE then dynamically updates the importance scores of all samples during training. With these techniques, SHADE manages to significantly improve the cache hit ratio of the DLT job, and thus, improves the job's training performance. Evaluation with representative computer vision (CV) models shows that SHADE, with a small cache, improves the cache hit ratio by up to 4.5 times compared to the LRU caching policy.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习训练 (DLT) 应用程序表现出独特的 I/O 工作负载行为，这给存储系统设计带来了新的挑战。 DLT 是 I/O 密集型，因为需要从远程存储中连续获取数据样本。 GPU 等加速器已被广泛用于支持这些应用程序。随着加速器变得更强大、更需要数据，I/O 性能会落后。这造成了一个关键的性能瓶颈，尤其是在分布式 DLT 中。同时，呈指数增长的数据集大小使得不可能将这些数据集完全存储在内存中。虽然当今的 DLT 框架通常使用随机抽样策略，对所有样本一视同仁，但最近的研究结果表明，并非所有样本都同等重要，并且不同的数据样本对提高模型准确性的贡献不同。这一观察结果通过利用重要性采样实现的数据局部性，为 DLT I/O 优化创造了机会。为此，我们设计并实现了 SHADE，这是一种新的 DLT 感知缓存系统，可检测每个样本级别的细粒度重要性变化，并利用该差异为分布式 DLT 作业做出明智的缓存决策。 SHADE 采用一种新颖的、基于排名的方法，该方法可以捕获不同小批量数据样本的相对重要性。然后，SHADE 在训练期间动态更新所有样本的重要性分数。通过这些技术，SHADE 显着提高了 DLT 作业的缓存命中率，从而提高了作业的训练性能。对代表性计算机视觉（CV）模型的评估表明，SHADE在小缓存的情况下，与LRU缓存策略相比，缓存命中率提高了4.5倍。

papers.title: SMRSTORE: A Storage Engine for Cloud Object Storage on HM-SMR Drives.
papers.abstract: Cloud object storage vendors are always in pursuit of better cost efficiency. Emerging Shingled Magnetic Recording (SMR) drives are becoming economically favorable in archival storage systems due to significantly improved areal density. However, for standard-class object storage, previous studies and our preliminary exploration revealed that the existing SMR drive solutions can experience severe throughput variations due to garbage collection (GC). In this paper, we introduce SMRSTORE, an SMR-based storage engine for standard-class object storage without compromising performance or durability. The key features of SMRSTORE include directly implementing chunk store interfaces over SMR drives, using a complete log-structured design, and applying guided data placement to reduce GC for consistent performance. The evaluation shows that SMRSTORE delivers comparable performance as Ext4 on the Conventional Magnetic Recording (CMR) drives, and can be up to 2.16x faster than F2FS on SMR drives. By switching to SMR drives, we have decreased the total cost by up to 15% and provided performance on par with the prior system for customers. Currently, we have deployed SMRSTORE in standard-class Alibaba Cloud Object Storage Service (OSS) to store hundreds of PBs of data. We plan to use SMR drives for all classes of OSS in the near future.
papers.abstract_zh: 云对象存储厂商始终追求更好的成本效率。由于显着提高了面密度，新兴的叠瓦式磁记录 (SMR) 驱动器在档案存储系统中变得经济上有利。然而，对于标准级对象存储，之前的研究和我们的初步探索表明，现有的 SMR 驱动解决方案可能会因垃圾收集 (GC) 而出现严重的吞吐量变化。在本文中，我们介绍了 SMRSTORE，这是一种基于 SMR 的存储引擎，用于标准级对象存储，而不影响性能或耐用性。 SMRSTORE 的主要功能包括通过 SMR 驱动器直接实现块存储接口、使用完整的日志结构设计以及应用引导数据放置来减少 GC 以实现一致的性能。评估表明，SMRSTORE 在传统磁记录 (CMR) 驱动器上提供与 Ext4 相当的性能，并且比 SMR 驱动器上的 F2FS 快 2.16 倍。通过改用 SMR 驱动器，我们将总成本降低了 15%，并为客户提供了与之前系统相当的性能。目前，我们已在标准级阿里云对象存储服务（OSS）中部署了SMRSTORE，可存储数百PB的数据。我们计划在不久的将来将 SMR 驱动器用于所有类别的 OSS。

papers.title: TENET: Memory Safe and Fault Tolerant Persistent Transactional Memory.
papers.abstract: Byte-addressable Non-Volatile Memory (NVM) allows programs to directly access storage using memory interface without going through the expensive conventional storage stack. However, direct access to NVM makes the NVM data vulnerable to software memory bugs (memory safety) and hardware errors (fault tolerance). This issue is critical because, unlike DRAM, corrupted data can persist forever, even after the system restart. Albeit the plethora of research on NVM programs and systems, there is little attention protecting NVM data from software bugs and hardware errors. In this paper, we propose TENET, a new NVM programming framework, which guarantees memory safety and fault-tolerance to protect NVM data against software bugs and hardware errors. TENET provides the most popular Persistent Transactional Memory (PTM) programming model. TENET leverages the concurrency and commit-time guarantees of a PTM to provide performant and cost-efficient memory safety and fault tolerance. Our evaluations shows that TENET offers the protection for NVM data at a modest performance overhead and storage cost, as compared to other PTMs with partial or no memory safety and fault-tolerance support.
papers.abstract_zh: 字节可寻址非易失性存储器 (NVM) 允许程序使用存储器接口直接访问存储，而无需通过昂贵的传统存储堆栈。然而，直接访问 NVM 会使 NVM 数据容易受到软件内存错误（内存安全）和硬件错误（容错）的影响。这个问题很关键，因为与 DRAM 不同，损坏的数据可能永远存在，即使在系统重新启动后也是如此。尽管对 NVM 程序和系统进行了大量研究，但很少有人关注保护 NVM 数据免受软件错误和硬件错误的影响。在本文中，我们提出了 TENET，一种新的 NVM 编程框架，它保证内存安全和容错，以保护 NVM 数据免受软件错误和硬件错误的影响。 TENET 提供了最流行的持久事务内存（PTM）编程模型。 TENET 利用 PTM 的并发性和提交时间保证来提供高性能且经济高效的内存安全性和容错能力。我们的评估表明，与其他部分或没有内存安全和容错支持的 PTM 相比，TENET 以适度的性能开销和存储成本提供了对 NVM 数据的保护。

papers.title: Unsafe at Any Copy: Name Collisions from Mixing Case Sensitivities.
papers.abstract: File name confusion attacks, such as malicious symlinks and file squatting, have long been studied as sources of security vulnerabilities. However, a recently emerged type, i.e., case-sensitivity-induced name collisions, has not been scrutinized. These collisions are introduced by differences in name resolution under case-sensitive and case-insensitive file systems or directories. A prominent example is the recent Git vulnerability (CVE-2021-21300) which can lead to code execution on a victim client when it clones a maliciously crafted repository onto a case-insensitive file system. With trends including ext4 adding support for per-directory case-insensitivity and the broad deployment of the Windows Subsystem for Linux, the prerequisites for such vulnerabilities are increasingly likely to exist even in a single system. In this paper, we make a first effort to investigate how and where the lack of any uniform approach to handling name collisions leads to a diffusion of responsibility and resultant vulnerabilities. Interestingly, we demonstrate the existence of a range of novel security challenges arising from name collisions and their inconsistent handling by low-level utilities and applications. Specifically, our experiments show that utilities handle many name collision scenarios unsafely, leaving the responsibility to applications whose developers are unfortunately not yet aware of the threats. We examine three case studies as a first step towards systematically understanding the emerging type of name collision vulnerability.
papers.abstract_zh: 文件名混淆攻击（例如恶意符号链接和文件抢注）长期以来一直被视为安全漏洞的来源。然而，最近出现的一种类型，即区分大小写引起的名称冲突，尚未得到仔细审查。这些冲突是由区分大小写和不区分大小写的文件系统或目录下的名称解析差异引起的。一个突出的例子是最近的 Git 漏洞 (CVE-2021-21300)，当受害者客户端将恶意制作的存储库克隆到不区分大小写的文件系统时，该漏洞可能会导致受害者客户端执行代码。随着 ext4 添加对每个目录不区分大小写的支持以及适用于 Linux 的 Windows 子系统的广泛部署等趋势，此类漏洞的先决条件甚至在单个系统中也越来越有可能存在。在本文中，我们首先努力调查缺乏处理名称冲突的统一方法如何以及在何处导致责任扩散和由此产生的漏洞。有趣的是，我们证明了由于名称冲突及其低级实用程序和应用程序的不一致处理而引起的一系列新的安全挑战的存在。具体来说，我们的实验表明，实用程序不安全地处理许多名称冲突场景，将责任留给了应用程序，不幸的是，这些应用程序的开发人员尚未意识到威胁。我们研究了三个案例研究，作为系统了解新兴类型的名称冲突漏洞的第一步。

papers.title: λ-IO: A Unified IO Stack for Computational Storage.
papers.abstract: The emerging computational storage device offers an opportunity for in-storage computing. It alleviates the overhead of data movement between the host and the device, and thus accelerates data-intensive applications. In this paper, we present λ-IO, a unified IO stack managing both computation and storage resources across the host and the device. We propose a set of designs – interface, runtime, and scheduling – to tackle three critical issues. We implement λ-IO in full-stack software and hardware environment, and evaluate it with synthetic and real applications against Linux IO, showing up to 5.12× performance improvement.
papers.abstract_zh: 新兴的计算存储设备为存储内计算提供了机会。它减轻了主机和设备之间数据移动的开销，从而加速数据密集型应用程序。在本文中，我们提出了 λ-IO，这是一个统一的 IO 堆栈，用于管理主机和设备上的计算和存储资源。我们提出了一套设计——界面、运行时和调度——来解决三个关键问题。我们在全栈软件和硬件环境中实现了 λ-IO，并通过针对 Linux IO 的综合和真实应用对其进行了评估，显示出高达 5.12 倍的性能提升。

papers.title: 25 Years of Storage Research and Education: A Retrospective.
papers.abstract: In the midst of graduate school (around 25 years ago), I worked on a final project in a database class, which served as my first (serious) introduction to I/O and storage, and soon I was hooked. Since that time, I have dedicated most of my research career to storage systems, including work on single-disk systems, disk-based RAIDs, large-scale distributed storage and data-processing systems, and modern storage devices, focusing largely on performance and reliability throughout. In this talk, I will discuss research highlights from many years of work in this space, and draw lessons for young researchers who are embarking upon their own research careers.
papers.abstract_zh: 在读研究生期间（大约 25 年前），我在数据库课程中完成了一个期末项目，这是我对 I/O 和存储的第一次（认真的）介绍，很快我就着迷了。从那时起，我将大部分研究生涯奉献给了存储系统，包括单磁盘系统、基于磁盘的 RAID、大规模分布式存储和数据处理系统以及现代存储设备，主要关注性能和可靠性。在本次演讲中，我将讨论该领域多年工作的研究亮点，并为正在开始自己的研究生涯的年轻研究人员吸取教训。

papers.title: A Log-Structured Merge Tree-aware Message Authentication Scheme for Persistent Key-Value Stores.
papers.abstract: Persistent key-value stores (KVSs) are fundamental building blocks of modern software products. A KVS stores persistent states for the products in the form of objects associated with their keys. Confidential computing (e.g., Intel Software Guard Extensions (SGX)) can help KVS protect data from unwanted leaks or manipulation if the KVS is adapted to use the protected memory efficiently. The characteristics of KVSs accommodating a large volume of data amplify one of the well-known performance bottlenecks of SGX, the limited size of the protected memory. An existing mechanism, Speicher, applied common techniques to overcome this. However, its design decision does not scale because the required protected memory size increases rapidly as the KVS receives additional data, resulting from the design choice to hide the long latency of Merkle tree-based freshness verification. We find that the unique characteristics of the log-structured merge (LSM) tree, a data structure that most popular persistent KVSs have, help reduce the high cost of protected memory consumption. We design TWEEZER on top of this observation by extending RocksDB, one of the most popular open-source persistent KVSs. We compare the performance of TWEEZER with the reproduced version of Speicher. Our evaluation using the standard db_bench reveals that TWEEZER outperforms Speicher by 1.94~6.23x resulting in a reduction of slowdown due to confidential computing from 16~30x to 4~9x.
papers.abstract_zh: 持久键值存储 (KVS) 是现代软件产品的基本构建块。 KVS 以与其键关联的对象的形式存储产品的持久状态。如果 KVS 适合高效使用受保护的内存，机密计算（例如英特尔软件防护扩展 (SGX)）可以帮助 KVS 保护数据免遭不必要的泄漏或操纵。 KVS 可容纳大量数据的特性放大了 SGX 众所周知的性能瓶颈之一，即受保护内存的有限大小。现有的机制 Speicher 应用通用技术来克服这个问题。然而，其设计决策无法扩展，因为随着 KVS 接收额外数据，所需的受保护内存大小会迅速增加，这是由于设计选择隐藏基于 Merkle 树的新鲜度验证的长延迟而导致的。我们发现日志结构合并（LSM）树（最流行的持久性 KVS 所具有的数据结构）的独特特性有助于降低受保护内存消耗的高成本。我们在此观察的基础上通过扩展 RocksDB（最流行的开源持久 KVS 之一）来设计 TWEEZER。我们将 TWEEZER 的性能与 Speicher 的复制版本进行比较。我们使用标准 db_bench 进行的评估表明，TWEEZER 的性能比 Speicher 提高了 1.94~6.23 倍，从而将机密计算导致的速度下降从 16~30 倍减少到 4~9 倍。

papers.title: Aurogon: Taming Aborts in All Phases for Distributed In-Memory Transactions.
papers.abstract: Flourishing OLTP applications promote transaction systems to scale out to datacenter-level clusters. Benefiting from high scalability, timestamp ordering (T/O) approaches tend to win out from a number of concurrency control protocols. However, under workloads with skewed access patterns, transaction systems based on T/O approaches still suffer severe performance degradation due to frequent transaction aborts. We present Aurogon, a distributed in-memory transaction system that pursues taming aborts in all execution phases of a T/O protocol. The key idea of Aurogon is to mitigate request reordering, the major cause of transaction aborts in T/O-based systems, in all phases: in the timestamp allocation phase, Aurogon uses a clock synchronization mechanism called 2LClock to provide accurate distributed clocks; in the request transfer phase, Aurogon adopts an adaptive request deferral mechanism to alleviate the impact of nonuniform data access latency; in the request execution phase, Aurogon pre-attaches certain requests to target data in order to prevent these requests from being issued late. Our evaluation shows that Aurogon increases throughput by up to 4.1x and cuts transaction abort rate by up to 73% compared with three state-of-the-art distributed transaction systems.
papers.abstract_zh: OLTP应用的蓬勃发展促进了事务系统向数据中心级集群的扩展。受益于高可扩展性，时间戳排序 (T/O) 方法往往会从许多并发控制协议中胜出。然而，在访问模式倾斜的工作负载下，基于 T/O 方法的事务系统仍然由于频繁的事务中止而遭受严重的性能下降。我们提出了 Aurogon，一个分布式内存事务系统，它追求在 T/O 协议的所有执行阶段中驯服中止。 Aurogon 的关键思想是在所有阶段减轻请求重新排序（这是基于 T/O 的系统中事务中止的主要原因）：在时间戳分配阶段，Aurogon 使用称为 2LClock 的时钟同步机制来提供准确的分布式时钟；在请求传输阶段，Aurogon采用自适应请求延迟机制来减轻非均匀数据访问延迟的影响；在请求执行阶段，Aurogon 预先将某些请求附加到目标数据，以防止这些请求延迟发出。我们的评估表明，与三种最先进的分布式事务系统相比，Aurogon 将吞吐量提高了 4.1 倍，并将事务中止率降低了 73%。

papers.title: CacheSifter: Sifting Cache Files for Boosted Mobile Performance and Lifetime.
papers.abstract: Mobile applications often maintain downloaded data as cache files in local storage for a better user experience. These cache files occupy a large portion of writes to mobile flash storage and have a significant impact on the performance and lifetime of mobile devices.
